title: Landing Page
description: A high-conversion landing page to launch your product or capture emails
longDescription: A beautiful, conversion-focused landing page with a hero section, features grid, testimonials, pricing table, and email capture form. Perfect for launching a new product or growing your waitlist.

questions.question: What product or idea are you launching?
questions.placeholder: A meal-planning app that uses AI to generate weekly recipes...
questions.hint: Describe your product — this becomes the hero headline.

questions.question: Who is this for?
questions.placeholder: Busy professionals who want to eat healthier without spending hours planning...
questions.hint: Helps us write copy that speaks to your customers.

questions.question: What should visitors do?
questions.placeholder: Sign up for early access, join the waitlist, start a free trial...
questions.hint: This will be the main call-to-action button.

styleOptions.title: Clean & Minimal
styleOptions.description: White space, subtle shadows, neutral palette with one accent color.

styleOptions.title: Bold & Modern
styleOptions.description: Dark backgrounds, vibrant gradients, large typography.

styleOptions.title: Tech & Futuristic
styleOptions.description: Gradients, glass morphism, neon accents. Looks like a tech startup.

styleOptions.title: Classic & Professional
styleOptions.description: Traditional layout, navy palette, professional typography.

features: Hero section with headline and CTA
systemPromptHint: You are building a landing page. Use Astro with Tailwind CSS. The page should have a hero section with a compelling headline, a features grid showing 3-6 key benefits, a testimonials section, a pricing table, and an email signup form. Make it conversion-focused with clear CTAs.
